messages.text: Hey Alex — your post on event-driven architecture at Stripe was great. I'm Nova from Embedding VC, we back early-stage AI startups and connect top talent. Open to exploring?
Thanks Nova! Yeah I'm always curious what's out there. What kind of companies are you working with?

We work with some exciting teams — mostly Series A AI infra companies. Your jump from Google to Stripe is fascinating. What drew you to payments infra, and what's been keeping you most engaged lately?

Honestly I love the scale problems at Stripe but I've been itching to work on something earlier stage. The architecture migration was fun but I miss the 0-to-1 feeling. Been looking at some ML infra teams.
